{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323054600C268D94934A6B7E0BA87\"}"},"total":7274},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7496002751119131417","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"终于看完了，应该说是一篇慢节奏生活文，破案、修行升级、捡漏夺宝、CP算是一些点缀，至于装逼灭敌之类情节最后稍稍带过、能符合渡劫器大修身份也就可以了。毕竟人家标题早就说过，讲的就是修仙归来后的日常生活。\n而且这样的结尾也算早有征兆，前面不是有一章女主说男主太监吗[偷笑]再结合行文风格和品茶、种地（灵药）的日常操作，估计作者的性格大概也不喜打杀情节，再加上番茄的一些政策原因，所以情节到这里就终止也算是合情合理了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745302920,"group_id":"6750703466034760717","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2148918724401479"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6750703466034760717","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2850"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读196小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":511759,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":706369,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":13},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7494633649734861593","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"背景设定和战力增长速度都比较合理，故事本身也充满生活气息，人物性格刻画生动真实、不脸谱化。虽说进度慢点、结尾仓促些但仍不失为一篇好故事。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744985214,"group_id":"6750703466034760717","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwlAQuZK4m14Lq1FP5bTjT0/Ulf7wvYFPp1tyD2zbX6t","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2148918724401479","user_name":"爱吃白果炖鸡的寇将军"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2148918724401479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6750703466034760717","book_info":{"abstract":"千年前，唐峰攀登昆仑山，意外坠崖，穿越上古星空大阵进入星辰之海，自此，走上修仙之路。千年征战，横扫星海，成就无上仙身，为紫微仙君。唐峰穿越星空大阵，损耗元神，重返地球，却发现，地球仅仅过去了六年的时间，而且，他还有了一个粉嘟嘟的宝贝女儿。高冷的霸道女总裁前女友，聪明的女儿，从此，让星辰之海战栗的紫微仙君，开启了极品奶爸的全新人生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/95e55266f458605c619801f6b4b366fa","author":"平放","author_id":"","book_id":"6750703466034760717","book_name":"长生归来当奶爸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":91,\"name\":\"多女主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91\u0026name=多女主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":42,\"name\":\"奶爸\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42\u0026name=奶爸\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6750741050949648909","read_count":"31306","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3732802"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"1850","tags":"都市修真,都市,穿越,奶爸,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/ff9900009235ff57516c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779399960\u0026x-signature=MtDrzvkeriVEG5ZDHZXXBj4zVHg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2420"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323054600C268D94934A6B7E0BA87\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读167小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":434408,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":599931,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1373},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6920124435496337423","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"章节内容不错，没有太夸张的成分！一切都是合情合理！为人处事的细节也很人性化。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1611217032,"group_id":"6750703466034760717","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"问你自己的内心","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N35EurWFruWBD9H1/f3qCvgc1ydw7h+IuHK1EnsKi6dE","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ac542200d6e44178b26f2e419514e6ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776790446\u0026x-signature=CP6Ym%2BshBVAlhVPDQ4jZSl8JldY%3D","user_id":"3087030655126855","user_name":"青玄子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3087030655126855","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6750703466034760717","book_info":{"abstract":"千年前，唐峰攀登昆仑山，意外坠崖，穿越上古星空大阵进入星辰之海，自此，走上修仙之路。千年征战，横扫星海，成就无上仙身，为紫微仙君。唐峰穿越星空大阵，损耗元神，重返地球，却发现，地球仅仅过去了六年的时间，而且，他还有了一个粉嘟嘟的宝贝女儿。高冷的霸道女总裁前女友，聪明的女儿，从此，让星辰之海战栗的紫微仙君，开启了极品奶爸的全新人生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/95e55266f458605c619801f6b4b366fa","author":"平放","author_id":"","book_id":"6750703466034760717","book_name":"长生归来当奶爸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":91,\"name\":\"多女主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91\u0026name=多女主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":42,\"name\":\"奶爸\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42\u0026name=奶爸\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6750741050949648909","read_count":"31306","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3732802"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"1850","tags":"都市修真,都市,穿越,奶爸,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/ff9900009235ff57516c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779399960\u0026x-signature=MtDrzvkeriVEG5ZDHZXXBj4zVHg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323054600C268D94934A6B7E0BA87\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":63799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":22660},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6804699626491609102","common":{"comment_type":2,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容真心不错，超级奶爸，心甘情愿的带着女儿居家生活，只有高大上的男人能做的到吧！男主很强，女主写得也用心，很少见到奶爸爽文，莫名带感哈哈哈。就是更新的有些慢了，作者加油快快更新。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1584107917,"group_id":"6750703466034760717","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世界太大，心装不下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+HrHgFj/r3wfrEztysWm2JA6fP+HVlHR5ax22I95x4g","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/c69ddce8093e436eaeb2b7c8965f82e1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776789865\u0026x-signature=KKXBZ4zFGzb4LTTdYiybcenS%2Bgk%3D","user_id":"4160168116367085","user_name":"我想要去很多个地方"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4160168116367085","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6750703466034760717","book_info":{"abstract":"千年前，唐峰攀登昆仑山，意外坠崖，穿越上古星空大阵进入星辰之海，自此，走上修仙之路。千年征战，横扫星海，成就无上仙身，为紫微仙君。唐峰穿越星空大阵，损耗元神，重返地球，却发现，地球仅仅过去了六年的时间，而且，他还有了一个粉嘟嘟的宝贝女儿。高冷的霸道女总裁前女友，聪明的女儿，从此，让星辰之海战栗的紫微仙君，开启了极品奶爸的全新人生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/95e55266f458605c619801f6b4b366fa","author":"平放","author_id":"","book_id":"6750703466034760717","book_name":"长生归来当奶爸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_typ
